notes: Store-facing copy SSOT draft. KrOffer grants stay authoritative in gateway code (services/gateway/src/monetization/offers.ts) until offers load from JSON.

en.name: Starter Pack
en.shortDescription: Gold, shards, and a key — fixed contents, no random loot.
en.storeCompliance: Does not grant gameplay power proportional to payment beyond stated currencies.

tr.name: Başlangıç Paketi
tr.shortDescription: Altın, shard ve anahtar — sabit içerik, rastgele ödül yok.
tr.storeCompliance: Ödemeyle belirsiz güç artışı yok; yalnızca tablodaki para birimleri.
